task_completion.description: Read the instructions ticket to understand the required schema changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/TICKET-881.txt'.
A web browser showing the Rancher UI dashboard after successfully logging in at https://localhost.

task_completion.description: Evolve the 'databases.platform.local' CRD schema to include the 'backupRetentionDays' field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI or terminal editor (e.g., via kubectl edit) showing the CustomResourceDefinition 'databases.platform.local' being modified to add 'backupRetentionDays' to its OpenAPI v3 schema properties.

task_completion.description: Fix the blocked manifest to include the new field with the correct value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing '/home/ga/Desktop/billing-db.yaml' being edited to include 'backupRetentionDays: 30'.

task_completion.description: Apply the fixed manifest to the cluster.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a successful 'kubectl apply -f /home/ga/Desktop/billing-db.yaml' command (e.g., 'created' or 'configured' message), or Rancher UI showing the 'billing-db' custom resource successfully deployed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent modified the actual CRD in the cluster.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CRD modification should be performed via the Rancher UI, 'kubectl edit', or 'kubectl apply', rather than just editing a disconnected local YAML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent applied the fixed manifest to the cluster.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal output confirming the manifest was applied to the cluster, or the resource appearing in the Rancher UI, not just saving the file locally.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually opened the ticket to find the retention days.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must have opened '/home/ga/Desktop/TICKET-881.txt' on screen before applying the 30-day retention value.

privileged_info_for_vlm: CRD Name: databases.platform.local. Manifest Path: /home/ga/Desktop/billing-db.yaml. Ticket Path: /home/ga/Desktop/TICKET-881.txt. Expected backupRetentionDays value to be added to the manifest: 30.
